subject: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Hi Irene,

I had a call with DataFlow Systems today about the Analytics Pipeline
integration. Key takeaways:

- They can deliver the testing phase by 11/11, which is 2 weeks behind our
schedule
- Pricing: $352K for the base package + $76K for Security Hardening add-on
- They require a 3-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Olivia Davis (Product Manager)

For comparison, DataFlow Systems quoted $359K with a more flexible contract.

Should we bring this to the Board Meeting for a final decision?

Best,
Tina
--
Tina Taylor
Architect | Starkindustries
+1-989-809-1066

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
David — 

Got it, makes sense. I'll loop in Grace from Engineering to get their
perspective on the CI/CD Platform changes. In the meantime, I've created a
shared doc where we can track the open items:

https://docs.google.com/d/9b04d152845ec0a3

Current open items (7 total):
- Aurora integration testing (owner: David)
- StreamLine Solutions contract review (owner: Irene)
- Observability Stack documentation (owner: Grace)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before our
Friday sync.

Thanks,
Irene
--
Irene Gonzalez
Globex | Marketing Department
Phone: +1-476-139-9252 | Email: irene.gonzalez@globex.io

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Thanks Fatima,

I reviewed the proposal for Security Hardening. Some thoughts:

- Section 6 needs more detail on the rollback strategy
- The response time numbers in Table 4 don't match what I see in the API Gateway
dashboard (showing 5% vs your 12%)
- Can we add a dependency map for the CI/CD Platform integration?
- The timeline for Sales involvement seems optimistic

Happy to discuss in our Monday sync.

Cheers,
Tina

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Hi Tina,

Thanks for flagging this. I've escalated to the HR team and they're looking into
the Search Index issue. Current status:

- Root cause: database connection pool exhaustion
- Impact: ~71 users affected in LATAM
- ETA for fix: 14:30 IST today
- Severity: P1

I'll keep this thread updated as we learn more. Irene is the point person if you
need immediate assistance.

Workaround: Contact support for manual override.

Regards,
Grace
---
Grace Martinez | Principal Engineer
Umbrella Corp
M: +1-557-698-7469 | E: grace.martinez@umbrella-corp.net

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Sprint Planning today. Here's a summary of what we
decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option A for the Search Index migration (projected
savings: $326K/yr)
- Aurora launch date moved to Q2 (from original Q4 target)
- Sales team will own the Data Governance workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the StreamLine Solutions contract timeline? (David to
investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for UX Designer? (Grace to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/04c8f8521681

Regards,
Irene

Best,
Irene Gonzalez
Technical Lead, Marketing
Globex
